name: 16q11_2_pericentric_heterochromatin
description: 16q11.2 pericentromeric heterochromatin block — large, highly variable satellite-DNA region adjacent to the 16 centromere. Composed of HSat2, HSat3, and pericentromeric SD duplicons; size polymorphism of 5-15 Mb in the population. Resolved end-to-end only in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: Composite block of HSat2 (chr1/16 specific satellite), HSat3, alpha-satellite higher-order repeats, and pericentromeric SDs derived from many ancestral donor loci; T2T-CHM13 resolves ~10 Mb total. GRCh38 contains gaps and underrepresents true content.
